lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing really, I'm new to town and wanted to get to know the locals.

lines.speaker: Cowardly Bandit
lines.text: I'm too busy for chitchat. Come back if you have some business to discuss with us.

lines.speaker: Cowardly Bandit
lines.text: You dog! You killed our champion and for that I hope you die a slow and painful death.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What was that? Are you looking for a fight?

lines.speaker: Cowardly Bandit
lines.text: Me? No, no, I was just, er, complimenting your, that is - don't kill me, please!
